## About Kulbaki

Kulbaki is a village in Tsageri municipality, Municipality in Racha-Lechkhumi and Lower Svaneti, Georgia.

## Location

Kulbaki is situated in **Tsageri municipality**, Municipality in Racha-Lechkhumi and Lower Svaneti region of Georgia.
